name: Agent Coordination Protocol
purpose: Structured multi-agent orchestration replacing freeform natural-language coordination with a typed, schema-validated, auditable protocol.

owned_requirements.IF-REQ-004: Structured multi-agent coordination via typed protocol
owned_requirements.IF-REQ-004A: No trust escalation via inter-agent messaging
owned_requirements.IF-REQ-004B: Shared resource serialization by task graph priority

invariants.description: Receiving agent effective tier = min(receiver_tier, sender_trust_tier). No trust escalation through messaging.
Shared resource lock priority = task graph critical path priority, then assignment timestamp. Never arrival-time ordering.
invariants.check_expression: granted_agent.graph_priority >= queued_agent.graph_priority OR (equal_priority AND granted_agent.assigned_at <= queued_agent.assigned_at)

invariants.description: All inter-agent messages are C16-schema-validated typed envelopes. Freeform NL is not a valid coordination mechanism.
invariants.check_expression: message_schema_validated == true for every dispatched message

invariants.description: Identical assignments exceeding threshold trigger HALT. Circular query patterns trigger HALT.
Every assignment, result, escalation, halt, and lock event is logged to C7 before the operation completes.
invariants.check_expression: audit_logged == true for all emitted events
invariants.required_evidence: Matching C7 audit log entries for every coordination trace event

deferred_scope: Orchestrator election in leaderless multi-agent setups
